title: D->C vocab mismatch — biz-language decision, impl-language topic

decisions.description: Customers cannot be billed twice for the same order
PII in logs must be redacted

note: If the LLM bridges biz language ('billed twice') to impl language ('idempotent payment'), it picks billing. The original M1 failure mode predicts a miss; recall here is the empirical recall rate against the v0.10.x architecture.

title: Ungrounded decision — visible only via skill judgment over history

decisions.description: Permission checks always run server-side; clients must never assume their own grant set
Session cookies expire after 12 hours of inactivity

note: Ungrounded decision (no binds_to edge) — region-anchored lookup cannot find it. Only the skill's history-reasoning step can surface it. Tests whether status='ungrounded' biases the LLM against picking it.
